name: Kindergarten Environmental Stewardship — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action through a close look at water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action through a guided practice with water, energy, habitats, and a small stewardship action.
